home.template:
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
<title data-cms="cms-110">4D Security - Cybersecurity in Four Dimensions</title>
<meta name="description" content="Multi-dimensional cybersecurity from 4D Security. Offensive testing, managed detection and response, cloud and data protection, and governance, from one partner." data-cms="cms-111">
<meta property="og:title" content="4D Security - Cybersecurity in Four Dimensions" data-cms="cms-112">
<meta property="og:description" content="Multi-dimensional cybersecurity from 4D Security. Offensive testing, managed detection and response, cloud and data protection, and governance, from one partner." data-cms="cms-113">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap');
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --bg:#0a0e14;            /* near-black navy */
  --bg-2:#0c1119;
  --surface:#111826;
  --surface-2:#161f30;
  --line:rgba(255,255,255,.09);
  --line-2:rgba(255,255,255,.14);
  --text:#e7ecf3;
  --muted:#8ea0b6;
  --muted-2:#617288;
  --accent:#3ea6ff;        /* electric azure (locked, whole page) */
  --accent-soft:#8fd0ff;
  --accent-ink:#07223a;
  --r:14px;                /* one radius scale: cards 14, pills full, inputs 10 */
  --r-lg:22px;
  --maxw:1240px;
  --ease:cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{
  background:var(--bg);
  color:var(--text);
  font-family:'Manrope',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;
  font-size:16px;line-height:1.6;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  overflow-x:hidden;
}
/* dimensional grid wash behind everything */
body::before{
  content:"";position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:-2;pointer-events:none;
  background:
    radial-gradient(900px 500px at 78% -8%, rgba(62,166,255,.14), transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(700px 600px at 2% 8%, rgba(62,166,255,.06), transparent 55%),
    linear-gradient(180deg,#0a0e14,#080b11);
}
body::after{
  content:"";position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:-1;pointer-events:none;opacity:.5;
  background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.03) 1px,transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.03) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:64px 64px;
  -webkit-mask-image:radial-gradient(1200px 700px at 60% 0%,#000,transparent 75%);
          mask-image:radial-gradient(1200px 700px at 60% 0%,#000,transparent 75%);
}
h1,h2,h3,h4{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-.02em;line-height:1.05;color:#fff}
a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}
.wrap{max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto;padding:0 28px}
.mono{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-weight:500;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent-soft)}
.eyebrow{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11.5px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent-soft)}
.eyebrow::before{content:"";width:22px;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--accent))}
.lede{color:var(--muted);font-size:18px;line-height:1.65;max-width:62ch}

/* ── buttons ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;font-weight:600;font-size:15px;
  padding:13px 22px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid transparent;cursor:pointer;
  transition:transform .25s var(--ease),box-shadow .25s var(--ease),background .25s var(--ease),border-color .25s var(--ease);white-space:nowrap}
.btn:active{transform:translateY(1px)}
.btn-primary{background:var(--accent);color:#04121f;box-shadow:0 10px 30px -10px rgba(62,166,255,.7)}
.btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 18px 44px -12px rgba(62,166,255,.85)}
.btn-ghost{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);color:var(--text);border-color:var(--line-2)}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:#fff;transform:translateY(-2px)}
.arrow{transition:transform .25s var(--ease)}
.btn:hover .arrow,.tile:hover .arrow{transform:translateX(4px)}

/* ── header / nav with CSS-only mega menu ────────────────── */
header{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
  background:rgba(9,13,20,.72);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}
.nav{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:22px;height:72px}
.brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:19px;color:#fff;letter-spacing:-.01em}
.brand .glyph{width:34px;height:34px;flex:none}
.brand small{display:block;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.34em;color:var(--muted-2);font-weight:500;margin-top:2px}
.nav-spacer{flex:1}
.nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;list-style:none}
.nav-links>li{position:relative}
.nav-links>li>a,.nav-trigger{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:9px 14px;border-radius:10px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600;font-size:14.5px;cursor:pointer;transition:color .2s,background .2s}
.nav-links>li>a:hover,.nav-trigger:hover,.has-mega:hover .nav-trigger{color:#fff;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
.chev{width:14px;height:14px;opacity:.7;transition:transform .25s var(--ease)}
.has-mega:hover .chev{transform:rotate(180deg)}
/* mega panel */
.mega{position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 12px);left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(8px);
  width:min(680px,92vw);background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line-2);border-radius:var(--r-lg);
  padding:14px;box-shadow:0 40px 80px -30px rgba(0,0,0,.8);opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none;
  transition:opacity .22s var(--ease),transform .22s var(--ease);z-index:60}
.mega::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:-14px;left:0;right:0;height:14px}
.has-mega:hover .mega{opacity:1;visibility:visible;pointer-events:auto;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}
.mega-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px}
.mega-item{display:block;padding:14px 15px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid transparent;transition:border-color .2s,background .2s}
.mega-item:hover{background:var(--surface-2);border-color:var(--line-2)}
.mega-item .mi-top{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.mega-item .dot{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--accent);flex:none;box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(62,166,255,.8)}
.mega-item h4{font-size:15.5px}
.mega-item p{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;line-height:1.5;margin-top:6px}
.mega-foot{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:10px;padding:12px 15px 4px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)}
.mega-foot span{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px}
.mega-foot a{color:var(--accent-soft);font-weight:600;font-size:14px}

/* mobile nav (checkbox hack) */
.nav-toggle{display:none}
.burger{display:none;width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--line-2);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);cursor:pointer;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.burger span,.burger span::before,.burger span::after{content:"";display:block;width:18px;height:2px;background:#fff;border-radius:2px;position:relative;transition:.25s var(--ease)}
.burger span::before{position:absolute;top:-6px}.burger span::after{position:absolute;top:6px}

/* ── footer ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
footer{border-top:1px solid var(--line);margin-top:96px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,rgba(62,166,255,.04))}
.foot{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:36px;padding:64px 0 40px}
.foot h5{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted-2);margin-bottom:16px;font-weight:500}
.foot ul{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.foot a{color:var(--muted);font-size:14.5px;transition:color .2s}
.foot a:hover{color:var(--accent-soft)}
.foot-brand p{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;margin-top:14px;max-width:34ch}
.foot-contact a{display:block;color:var(--text);font-weight:600;font-size:15px;margin-bottom:6px}
.foot-bottom{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  padding:22px 0 40px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)}
.foot-bottom p,.foot-bottom a{color:var(--muted-2);font-size:13px}

/* ── reveal (restrained, reduced-motion safe) ────────────── */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:no-preference){
  @keyframes rise{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(26px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
  .reveal{animation:rise .8s var(--ease) both;animation-timeline:view();animation-range:entry 0% entry 26%}
  @keyframes spin4d{to{transform:rotateX(360deg) rotateY(360deg)}}
}

/* ── shared section furniture ────────────────────────────── */
section{position:relative}
.section-head{max-width:64ch}
.section-head h2{font-size:clamp(30px,4.2vw,46px)}
.section-head .lede{margin-top:16px}
.pad{padding:96px 0}
.divider{height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--line-2),transparent)}

/* ── hero (home) ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
.hero{position:relative;padding:64px 0 40px}
.hero-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.05fr .95fr;gap:40px;align-items:center;min-height:min(78vh,660px)}
.hero h1{font-size:clamp(42px,6.6vw,78px);margin:20px 0 0}
.hero h1 .accent{color:var(--accent)}
.hero .lede{margin:22px 0 30px;font-size:19px}
.hero-ctas{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:14px}
.hero-meta{display:flex;gap:30px;margin-top:38px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.hero-meta .k{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:30px;color:#fff;font-weight:600}
.hero-meta .v{color:var(--muted);font-size:13.5px;margin-top:2px}
.hero-visual{position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:420px}
.orbit{position:relative;width:min(460px,86vw);aspect-ratio:1}
.tess{width:100%;height:100%;filter:drop-shadow(0 24px 60px rgba(62,166,255,.28))}
.spin{transform-origin:160px 160px}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:no-preference){.spin{animation:spin2 26s linear infinite}@keyframes spin2{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}}
.node{position:absolute;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--accent-soft);background:rgba(9,13,20,.7);border:1px solid var(--line-2);padding:6px 11px;border-radius:999px;backdrop-filter:blur(6px)}
.node.n1{top:4%;left:14%}.node.n2{top:14%;right:2%}.node.n3{bottom:12%;right:8%}.node.n4{bottom:2%;left:8%}

/* ── dimension tiles / cards (collection) ────────────────── */
.dim-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px;margin-top:44px}
.tile{position:relative;display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:30px 30px 26px;border-radius:var(--r-lg);
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--surface),var(--bg-2));border:1px solid var(--line);
  overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .3s var(--ease),transform .3s var(--ease)}
.tile::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:inherit;padding:1px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s var(--ease);
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(62,166,255,.6),transparent 40%);-webkit-mask:linear-gradient(#000 0 0) content-box,linear-gradient(#000 0 0);-webkit-mask-composite:xor;mask-composite:exclude}
.tile:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);border-color:var(--line-2)}
.tile:hover::after{opacity:1}
.tile .coord{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.16em;color:var(--muted-2)}
.tile h3{font-size:27px;margin:14px 0 10px}
.tile p{color:var(--muted);font-size:15px;line-height:1.6}
.chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin:18px 0 22px}
.chips span{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--accent-soft);background:rgba(62,166,255,.09);border:1px solid rgba(62,166,255,.22);padding:5px 11px;border-radius:999px;font-weight:500}
.tile-link{margin-top:auto;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;color:#fff;font-weight:600;font-size:15px}
.tile-link .arrow{color:var(--accent)}

/* ── stepped flow ────────────────────────────────────────── */
.flow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:0;margin-top:44px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r-lg);overflow:hidden}
.step{padding:30px 26px;border-right:1px solid var(--line);position:relative;background:rgba(255,255,255,.012)}
.step:last-child{border-right:none}
.step .num{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:.14em}
.step h4{font-size:21px;margin:12px 0 8px}
.step p{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;line-height:1.55}

/* ── image + text feature ────────────────────────────────── */
.feature{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.05fr;gap:44px;align-items:center;margin-top:8px}
.feature.flip{grid-template-columns:1.05fr 1fr}
.feature.flip .shot{order:2}
.feature .shot{border-radius:var(--r-lg);overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--line-2);position:relative;aspect-ratio:4/3}
.feature .shot img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.feature .shot::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,rgba(10,14,20,.5)),linear-gradient(120deg,rgba(62,166,255,.12),transparent 55%)}
.feature h2{font-size:clamp(28px,3.6vw,40px)}
.feature .lede{margin:16px 0 22px}
.ficons{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;margin:6px 0 26px}
.ficons li{display:flex;gap:13px;align-items:flex-start;list-style:none}
.ficons .b{width:22px;height:22px;flex:none;margin-top:2px;border-radius:6px;background:rgba(62,166,255,.12);border:1px solid rgba(62,166,255,.3);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--accent);font-size:13px;font-weight:700}
.ficons b{color:#fff;font-weight:600}.ficons p{color:var(--muted);font-size:14.5px;margin-top:2px}

/* ── why / divided list ──────────────────────────────────── */
.why{display:grid;grid-template-columns:.8fr 1.2fr;gap:48px;align-items:start}
.why-sticky{position:sticky;top:100px}
.why-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.why-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr;gap:20px;padding:26px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--line)}
.why-row:first-child{border-top:none;padding-top:0}
.why-row .rc{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted-2);padding-top:5px}
.why-row h4{font-size:20px;margin-bottom:8px}
.why-row p{color:var(--muted);font-size:15px}

/* ── CTA band ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cta-band{margin-top:20px;border-radius:var(--r-lg);border:1px solid var(--line-2);overflow:hidden;position:relative;
  background:radial-gradient(700px 300px at 80% 0%,rgba(62,166,255,.22),transparent 60%),linear-gradient(180deg,var(--surface),var(--bg-2))}
.cta-band .inner{padding:60px 48px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:26px;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.cta-band h2{font-size:clamp(28px,3.6vw,40px);max-width:16ch}
.cta-band p{color:var(--muted);margin-top:12px}
.cta-actions{display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap}

/* ── inner-page hero (category / company / contact) ──────── */
.phero{padding:70px 0 20px;position:relative}
.phero .coord{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.18em;color:var(--muted-2);display:block;margin-bottom:14px}
.phero h1{font-size:clamp(38px,5.4vw,64px);max-width:16ch}
.phero .lede{margin:20px 0 28px;font-size:19px}
.phero-ctas{display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.crumbs{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted-2);margin-bottom:22px}
.crumbs a{color:var(--muted)}.crumbs a:hover{color:var(--accent-soft)}

/* ── service grid (category capabilities, collection) ────── */
.svc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;margin-top:40px}
.svc{display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:24px;border-radius:var(--r);background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);transition:border-color .25s var(--ease),transform .25s var(--ease),background .25s var(--ease)}
.svc:hover{border-color:var(--line-2);transform:translateY(-3px);background:var(--surface-2)}
.svc .tag{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--accent-soft);margin-bottom:12px}
.svc h3{font-size:18px;margin-bottom:8px}
.svc p{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;line-height:1.55}
.svc .more{margin-top:14px;color:var(--accent-soft);font-weight:600;font-size:13.5px}

/* ── sibling dimensions nav ──────────────────────────────── */
.siblings{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;margin-top:40px}
.sib{display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:24px;border-radius:var(--r);border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--bg-2);transition:border-color .25s,transform .25s}
.sib:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.sib .coord{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted-2);letter-spacing:.14em}
.sib h4{font-size:20px;margin:10px 0 6px}
.sib p{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px}
.sib .go{margin-top:14px;color:#fff;font-weight:600;font-size:14px}

/* ── stat strip ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
.stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1px;background:var(--line);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r-lg);overflow:hidden;margin-top:8px}
.stats>div{background:var(--bg-2);padding:30px 26px}
.stats .k{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:34px;color:#fff;font-weight:600}
.stats .v{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;margin-top:6px}

/* ── contact ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:40px;align-items:start;margin-top:12px}
.field{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-bottom:18px}
.field label{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600}
.field input,.field textarea,.field select{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--line-2);border-radius:10px;
  padding:13px 15px;color:var(--text);font:inherit;font-size:15px;transition:border-color .2s}
.field input::placeholder,.field textarea::placeholder{color:var(--muted-2)}
.field input:focus,.field textarea:focus,.field select:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(62,166,255,.16)}
.field.row{flex-direction:row;gap:12px}.field.row>*{flex:1}
.contact-card{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r-lg);padding:30px;background:var(--surface)}
.contact-card h3{font-size:19px;margin-bottom:16px}
.cline{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;padding:14px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--line)}
.cline:first-of-type{border-top:none}
.cline .ic{width:26px;flex:none;color:var(--accent);font-size:16px;text-align:center}
.cline b{display:block;color:#fff;font-size:15px}.cline span{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px}

/* ── article (tier-3) ────────────────────────────────────── */
.article{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;max-width:820px;margin:0 auto}
.article h2{font-size:clamp(24px,3vw,32px);margin:44px 0 14px}
.article h3{font-size:20px;margin:30px 0 10px}
.article p{color:var(--muted);font-size:16.5px;line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:16px}
.article ul{margin:0 0 20px 0;padding:0;list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.article ul li{color:var(--muted);font-size:16px;line-height:1.6;padding-left:26px;position:relative}
.article ul li::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;top:9px;width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--accent)}
.callout{border:1px solid var(--line-2);border-left:3px solid var(--accent);border-radius:12px;padding:22px 24px;background:var(--surface);margin:26px 0}
.callout p{color:var(--text);margin:0}

@media (max-width:920px){
  .hero-grid,.feature,.feature.flip,.why,.contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .feature.flip .shot{order:0}
  .hero-visual{order:-1;min-height:320px}
  .why-sticky{position:static}
  .dim-grid,.svc-grid,.siblings{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .flow,.stats{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .step:nth-child(2n){border-right:none}
}
@media (max-width:640px){
  .dim-grid,.svc-grid,.siblings,.flow,.stats{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .step{border-right:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}
  .stats>div{padding:24px}
  .cta-band .inner{padding:40px 26px}
}

/* ── responsive ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width:900px){
  .foot{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:30px}
  .burger{display:flex}
  .nav-links{position:fixed;inset:72px 0 auto 0;flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;gap:0;
    background:var(--bg-2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);padding:8px;
    max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height .3s var(--ease)}
  .nav-toggle:checked~.nav-links{max-height:80vh;overflow:auto}
  .nav-links>li>a,.nav-trigger{padding:14px 16px;font-size:16px;border-radius:12px}
  .mega{position:static;transform:none;width:auto;opacity:1;visibility:visible;pointer-events:auto;
    box-shadow:none;background:transparent;border:none;padding:6px 6px 14px}
  .mega-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .nav .btn{display:none}
}
@media (max-width:620px){
  .foot{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .wrap{padding:0 20px}
  .pad{padding:70px 0}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<header>
  <div class="wrap">
    <nav class="nav">
      <input type="checkbox" id="navToggle" class="nav-toggle" hidden="">
      <a href="/" class="brand"><svg class="glyph" viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
  <rect x="30" y="30" width="40" height="40" rx="3" stroke="#3ea6ff" stroke-width="4"></rect>
  <rect x="14" y="14" width="52" height="52" rx="4" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="3" opacity=".65"></rect>
  <path d="M14 14 30 30M66 14 70 30M14 66 30 70M66 66 70 70" stroke="#3ea6ff" stroke-width="3" opacity=".8"></path>
</svg><span data-cms="cms-1">4D Security<small>ALL DIMENSIONS</small></span></a>
      <div class="nav-spacer"></div>
      <ul class="nav-links" data-cms-collection="col1">
        <li class="has-mega">
          <span class="nav-trigger" data-cms="cms-2">Solutions
            <svg class="chev" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"></path></svg>
          </span>
          <div class="mega">
            <div class="mega-grid" data-cms-collection="col2">
              <a href="/offense" class="mega-item" data-cms-item="col2"><div class="mi-top"><span class="dot"></span><h4 data-cms="cms-3">Offense</h4></div><p data-cms="cms-4">Offensive testing that finds the gaps before an attacker does.</p></a>
              <a href="/defense" class="mega-item" data-cms-item="col2"><div class="mi-top"><span class="dot"></span><h4 data-cms="cms-5">Defense</h4></div><p data-cms="cms-6">Managed detection and response watching your estate around the clock.</p></a>
              <a href="/protection" class="mega-item" data-cms-item="col2"><div class="mi-top"><span class="dot"></span><h4 data-cms="cms-7">Protection</h4></div><p data-cms="cms-8">Cloud, data and identity controls that hold under pressure.</p></a>
              <a href="/governance" class="mega-item" data-cms-item="col2"><div class="mi-top"><span class="dot"></span><h4 data-cms="cms-9">Governance</h4></div><p data-cms="cms-10">Risk, compliance and critical systems, mapped to your business.</p></a>
            </div>
            <div class="mega-foot"><span data-cms="cms-11">Thirty capabilities, organised into four dimensions.</span><a href="/company" class="arrow-link" data-cms="cms-12">Why four dimensions ›</a></div>
          </div>
        </li>
        <li data-cms-item="col1"><a href="/company" data-cms="cms-13">Company</a></li>
        <li data-cms-item="col1"><a href="/contact" data-cms="cms-14">Contact</a></li>
      </ul>
      <a href="/contact" class="btn btn-primary" data-cms="cms-15">Book a consultation</a>
      <label for="navToggle" class="burger" aria-label="Menu"><span></span></label>
    </nav>
  </div>
</header>
<main data-cms-collection="col3">
<section id="hero" class="hero">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="hero-grid">
      <div class="hero-copy">
        <span class="eyebrow" data-cms="cms-16">4D · All Dimensions</span>
        <h1 data-cms="cms-17">Security in every <span class="accent">dimension.</span></h1>
        <p class="lede" data-cms="cms-18">4D Security defends your business across four dimensions, offense, defense, protection and governance, so nothing sits in a blind spot.</p>
        <div class="hero-ctas">
          <a href="/contact" class="btn btn-primary" data-cms="cms-19">Book a consultation <span class="arrow">→</span></a>
          <a href="/offense" class="btn btn-ghost" data-cms="cms-20">Explore the four dimensions</a>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-meta">
          <div><div class="k">4</div><div class="v">dimensions of defense</div></div>
          <div><div class="k">30+</div><div class="v">security capabilities</div></div>
          <div><div class="k">24/7</div><div class="v">detection and response</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-visual" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="orbit">
    <span class="node n1" data-cms="cms-21">Offense</span>
    <span class="node n2" data-cms="cms-22">Defense</span>
    <span class="node n3" data-cms="cms-23">Protection</span>
    <span class="node n4" data-cms="cms-24">Governance</span>
    <svg class="tess" viewBox="0 0 320 320" fill="none">
      <defs><linearGradient id="g1" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#8fd0ff"></stop><stop offset="1" stop-color="#3ea6ff"></stop></linearGradient></defs>
      <g class="spin">
        <rect x="108" y="108" width="104" height="104" rx="6" stroke="url(#g1)" stroke-width="2.5"></rect>
        <rect x="64" y="64" width="192" height="192" rx="10" stroke="#3ea6ff" stroke-width="2" opacity=".55"></rect>
        <path d="M64 64 108 108M256 64 212 108M64 256 108 212M256 256 212 212" stroke="#3ea6ff" stroke-width="2" opacity=".7"></path>
        <g fill="#8fd0ff"><circle cx="64" cy="64" r="4"></circle><circle cx="256" cy="64" r="4"></circle><circle cx="64" cy="256" r="4"></circle><circle cx="256" cy="256" r="4"></circle></g>
        <g fill="#3ea6ff"><circle cx="108" cy="108" r="3.5"></circle><circle cx="212" cy="108" r="3.5"></circle><circle cx="108" cy="212" r="3.5"></circle><circle cx="212" cy="212" r="3.5"></circle></g>
      </g>
    </svg>
  </div>
</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="dimensions" class="pad" data-cms-item="col3">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head">
      <span class="eyebrow" data-cms="cms-25">The four dimensions</span>
      <h2 data-cms="cms-26">One partner. Four dimensions of defense.</h2>
      <p class="lede" data-cms="cms-27">Most firms sell you a product. We cover the whole picture, then map every capability to the way your business actually runs.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="dim-grid" data-cms-collection="col4">
      <a href="/offense" class="tile" data-cms-item="col4"><span class="coord" data-cms="cms-28">D1 / OFFENSE</span><h3 data-cms="cms-29">Find it first</h3><p data-cms="cms-30">Offensive testing that thinks like an attacker, so weaknesses surface on your terms instead of theirs.</p><div class="chips"><span data-cms="cms-31">Penetration Testing</span><span data-cms="cms-32">Attack Surface</span><span data-cms="cms-33">Breach Simulation</span><span data-cms="cms-34">Phishing</span></div><span class="tile-link" data-cms="cms-35">Explore Offense <span class="arrow">→</span></span></a>
      <a href="/defense" class="tile" data-cms-item="col4"><span class="coord" data-cms="cms-36">D2 / DEFENSE</span><h3 data-cms="cms-37">Watch and respond</h3><p data-cms="cms-38">Managed detection and response across endpoint, cloud and inbox, with an analyst-led SOC that never clocks out.</p><div class="chips"><span data-cms="cms-39">EDR / MDR</span><span data-cms="cms-40">AI SOC</span><span data-cms="cms-41">Incident Response</span><span data-cms="cms-42">BEC Defense</span></div><span class="tile-link" data-cms="cms-43">Explore Defense <span class="arrow">→</span></span></a>
      <a href="/protection" class="tile" data-cms-item="col4"><span class="coord" data-cms="cms-44">D3 / PROTECTION</span><h3 data-cms="cms-45">Hold the line</h3><p data-cms="cms-46">Cloud, data and identity controls that stay strong under load, from posture management to passwordless access.</p><div class="chips"><span data-cms="cms-47">CNAPP / CSPM</span><span data-cms="cms-48">Data Security</span><span data-cms="cms-49">IAM / PAM</span><span data-cms="cms-50">Micro-Segmentation</span></div><span class="tile-link" data-cms="cms-51">Explore Protection <span class="arrow">→</span></span></a>
      <a href="/governance" class="tile" data-cms-item="col4"><span class="coord" data-cms="cms-52">D4 / GOVERNANCE</span><h3 data-cms="cms-53">Prove it works</h3><p data-cms="cms-54">Risk, compliance and critical systems, translated into evidence your board, auditors and regulators accept.</p><div class="chips"><span data-cms="cms-55">GRC</span><span data-cms="cms-56">Fractional CISO</span><span data-cms="cms-57">OT / ICS / SCADA</span><span data-cms="cms-58">AI Governance</span></div><span class="tile-link" data-cms="cms-59">Explore Governance <span class="arrow">→</span></span></a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="approach" class="pad" data-cms-item="col3">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head"><h2 data-cms="cms-60">A method, not a product pitch.</h2><p class="lede" data-cms="cms-61">Every engagement moves through the same four moves, so you always know where you stand and what comes next.</p></div>
    <div class="flow" data-cms-collection="col5">
      <div class="step" data-cms-item="col5"><div class="num">01</div><h4 data-cms="cms-62">Assess</h4><p data-cms="cms-63">We map your attack surface, controls and crown-jewel assets against real-world threats.</p></div>
      <div class="step" data-cms-item="col5"><div class="num">02</div><h4 data-cms="cms-64">Harden</h4><p data-cms="cms-65">We close the gaps that matter first, tuning controls to your operations rather than a checklist.</p></div>
      <div class="step" data-cms-item="col5"><div class="num">03</div><h4 data-cms="cms-66">Watch</h4><p data-cms="cms-67">Our SOC monitors endpoint, cloud, identity and OT, and responds the moment something moves.</p></div>
      <div class="step" data-cms-item="col5"><div class="num">04</div><h4 data-cms="cms-68">Prove</h4><p data-cms="cms-69">You get reporting that stands up to auditors, regulators and the board, in plain language.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="critical" class="pad" data-cms-item="col3">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="feature">
      <div class="shot"><img src="https://picsum.photos/seed/4dsec-ot-plant/1200/900" alt="Industrial control room protected by 4D Security" data-cms-img="cms-109"></div>
      <div>
        <h2 data-cms="cms-70">Built for the systems that cannot go down.</h2>
        <p class="lede" data-cms="cms-71">Plants, pipelines and production lines were never meant to touch the internet. We secure the operational technology that keeps them running, without stopping the line.</p>
        <ul class="ficons" data-cms-collection="col6">
          <li data-cms-item="col6"><span class="b">•</span><div><b data-cms="cms-72">OT and ICS coverage</b><p data-cms="cms-73">SCADA, PLCs and IoT protected by connecting risks to the compensating controls you already own.</p></div></li>
          <li data-cms-item="col6"><span class="b">•</span><div><b data-cms="cms-74">Safe by design</b><p data-cms="cms-75">Passive discovery and micro-segmentation that respect uptime and safety requirements.</p></div></li>
          <li data-cms-item="col6"><span class="b">•</span><div><b data-cms="cms-76">One view, IT and OT</b><p data-cms="cms-77">A single pane across corporate and plant-floor networks, so nothing hides in the seam.</p></div></li>
        </ul>
        <a href="/governance" class="btn btn-ghost" data-cms="cms-78">See Governance and critical systems <span class="arrow">→</span></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="why" class="pad" data-cms-item="col3">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="why">
      <div class="why-sticky"><h2 data-cms="cms-79">Why teams pick 4D.</h2><p class="lede" data-cms="cms-80">Multi-dimensional security that prioritises the operational goals of our clients, not a stack of tools you have to run yourself.</p></div>
      <div class="why-list" data-cms-collection="col7">
        <div class="why-row" data-cms-item="col7"><div class="rc">01</div><div><h4 data-cms="cms-81">One partner, the full picture</h4><p data-cms="cms-82">Offense, defense, protection and governance under one roof, so your controls actually talk to each other.</p></div></div>
        <div class="why-row" data-cms-item="col7"><div class="rc">02</div><div><h4 data-cms="cms-83">Mapped to your business</h4><p data-cms="cms-84">We tie every finding to a compensating control and a business goal, so security spend goes where the risk is.</p></div></div>
        <div class="why-row" data-cms-item="col7"><div class="rc">03</div><div><h4 data-cms="cms-85">Analyst-led, AI-accelerated</h4><p data-cms="cms-86">An AI-assisted SOC that gives our analysts speed, with humans making the call that matters.</p></div></div>
        <div class="why-row" data-cms-item="col7"><div class="rc">04</div><div><h4 data-cms="cms-87">Evidence you can hand over</h4><p data-cms="cms-88">Board-ready and audit-ready reporting that turns technical work into business continuity and legal defensibility.</p></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="cta" class="pad" data-cms-item="col3">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="cta-band"><div class="inner">
      <div><h2 data-cms="cms-89">See your security in four dimensions.</h2><p data-cms="cms-90">A short consultation, a clear picture of where you stand, and a plan you can act on.</p></div>
      <div class="cta-actions">
        <a href="/contact" class="btn btn-primary" data-cms="cms-91">Book a consultation <span class="arrow">→</span></a>
        <a href="tel:+18166651900" class="btn btn-ghost" data-cms="cms-92">816.665.1900</a>
      </div>
    </div></div>
  </div>
</section>
</main>
<footer>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="foot" data-cms-collection="col8">
      <div class="foot-brand">
        <a href="/" class="brand"><svg class="glyph" viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
  <rect x="30" y="30" width="40" height="40" rx="3" stroke="#3ea6ff" stroke-width="4"></rect>
  <rect x="14" y="14" width="52" height="52" rx="4" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="3" opacity=".65"></rect>
  <path d="M14 14 30 30M66 14 70 30M14 66 30 70M66 66 70 70" stroke="#3ea6ff" stroke-width="3" opacity=".8"></path>
</svg><span data-cms="cms-93">4D Security<small>ALL DIMENSIONS</small></span></a>
        <p data-cms="cms-94">Multi-dimensional security built around your operational goals, from offensive testing to governance.</p>
      </div>
      <div data-cms-item="col8">
        <h5 data-cms="cms-95">Dimensions</h5>
        <ul data-cms-collection="col9">
          <li data-cms-item="col9"><a href="/offense" data-cms="cms-96">Offense</a></li>
          <li data-cms-item="col9"><a href="/defense" data-cms="cms-97">Defense</a></li>
          <li data-cms-item="col9"><a href="/protection" data-cms="cms-98">Protection</a></li>
          <li data-cms-item="col9"><a href="/governance" data-cms="cms-99">Governance</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div data-cms-item="col8">
        <h5 data-cms="cms-100">Company</h5>
        <ul data-cms-collection="col10">
          <li data-cms-item="col10"><a href="/company" data-cms="cms-101">Why 4D</a></li>
          <li data-cms-item="col10"><a href="/penetration-testing" data-cms="cms-102">Penetration Testing</a></li>
          <li data-cms-item="col10"><a href="/contact" data-cms="cms-103">Contact</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="foot-contact" data-cms-collection="col11">
        <h5 data-cms="cms-104">Talk to us</h5>
        <a href="mailto:info@4DSec.io" data-cms="cms-105" data-cms-item="col11">info@4DSec.io</a>
        <a href="tel:+18166651900" data-cms="cms-106" data-cms-item="col11">816.665.1900</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="foot-bottom">
      <p data-cms="cms-107">© 2026 4D Security, LLC. All rights reserved.</p>
      <a href="/contact" data-cms="cms-108">Request a security consultation</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

</body></html>

offense.template:
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
<title data-cms="cms-90">Offense - Offensive Security & Testing | 4D Security</title>
<meta name="description" content="Penetration testing, attack surface management, breach and attack simulation, phishing and awareness training from 4D Security. Find the gaps before attackers do." data-cms="cms-91">
<meta property="og:title" content="Offense - Offensive Security & Testing | 4D Security" data-cms="cms-92">
<meta property="og:description" content="Penetration testing, attack surface management, breach and attack simulation, phishing and awareness training from 4D Security. Find the gaps before attackers do." data-cms="cms-93">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap');
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --bg:#0a0e14;            /* near-black navy */
  --bg-2:#0c1119;
  --surface:#111826;
  --surface-2:#161f30;
  --line:rgba(255,255,255,.09);
  --line-2:rgba(255,255,255,.14);
  --text:#e7ecf3;
  --muted:#8ea0b6;
  --muted-2:#617288;
  --accent:#3ea6ff;        /* electric azure (locked, whole page) */
  --accent-soft:#8fd0ff;
  --accent-ink:#07223a;
  --r:14px;                /* one radius scale: cards 14, pills full, inputs 10 */
  --r-lg:22px;
  --maxw:1240px;
  --ease:cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{
  background:var(--bg);
  color:var(--text);
  font-family:'Manrope',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;
  font-size:16px;line-height:1.6;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  overflow-x:hidden;
}
/* dimensional grid wash behind everything */
body::before{
  content:"";position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:-2;pointer-events:none;
  background:
    radial-gradient(900px 500px at 78% -8%, rgba(62,166,255,.14), transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(700px 600px at 2% 8%, rgba(62,166,255,.06), transparent 55%),
    linear-gradient(180deg,#0a0e14,#080b11);
}
body::after{
  content:"";position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:-1;pointer-events:none;opacity:.5;
  background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.03) 1px,transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.03) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:64px 64px;
  -webkit-mask-image:radial-gradient(1200px 700px at 60% 0%,#000,transparent 75%);
          mask-image:radial-gradient(1200px 700px at 60% 0%,#000,transparent 75%);
}
h1,h2,h3,h4{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-.02em;line-height:1.05;color:#fff}
a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}
.wrap{max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto;padding:0 28px}
.mono{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-weight:500;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent-soft)}
.eyebrow{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11.5px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent-soft)}
.eyebrow::before{content:"";width:22px;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--accent))}
.lede{color:var(--muted);font-size:18px;line-height:1.65;max-width:62ch}

/* ── buttons ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;font-weight:600;font-size:15px;
  padding:13px 22px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid transparent;cursor:pointer;
  transition:transform .25s var(--ease),box-shadow .25s var(--ease),background .25s var(--ease),border-color .25s var(--ease);white-space:nowrap}
.btn:active{transform:translateY(1px)}
.btn-primary{background:var(--accent);color:#04121f;box-shadow:0 10px 30px -10px rgba(62,166,255,.7)}
.btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 18px 44px -12px rgba(62,166,255,.85)}
.btn-ghost{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);color:var(--text);border-color:var(--line-2)}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:#fff;transform:translateY(-2px)}
.arrow{transition:transform .25s var(--ease)}
.btn:hover .arrow,.tile:hover .arrow{transform:translateX(4px)}

/* ── header / nav with CSS-only mega menu ────────────────── */
header{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
  background:rgba(9,13,20,.72);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}
.nav{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:22px;height:72px}
.brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:19px;color:#fff;letter-spacing:-.01em}
.brand .glyph{width:34px;height:34px;flex:none}
.brand small{display:block;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.34em;color:var(--muted-2);font-weight:500;margin-top:2px}
.nav-spacer{flex:1}
.nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;list-style:none}
.nav-links>li{position:relative}
.nav-links>li>a,.nav-trigger{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:9px 14px;border-radius:10px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600;font-size:14.5px;cursor:pointer;transition:color .2s,background .2s}
.nav-links>li>a:hover,.nav-trigger:hover,.has-mega:hover .nav-trigger{color:#fff;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
.chev{width:14px;height:14px;opacity:.7;transition:transform .25s var(--ease)}
.has-mega:hover .chev{transform:rotate(180deg)}
/* mega panel */
.mega{position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 12px);left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(8px);
  width:min(680px,92vw);background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line-2);border-radius:var(--r-lg);
  padding:14px;box-shadow:0 40px 80px -30px rgba(0,0,0,.8);opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none;
  transition:opacity .22s var(--ease),transform .22s var(--ease);z-index:60}
.mega::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:-14px;left:0;right:0;height:14px}
.has-mega:hover .mega{opacity:1;visibility:visible;pointer-events:auto;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}
.mega-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px}
.mega-item{display:block;padding:14px 15px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid transparent;transition:border-color .2s,background .2s}
.mega-item:hover{background:var(--surface-2);border-color:var(--line-2)}
.mega-item .mi-top{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.mega-item .dot{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--accent);flex:none;box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(62,166,255,.8)}
.mega-item h4{font-size:15.5px}
.mega-item p{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;line-height:1.5;margin-top:6px}
.mega-foot{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:10px;padding:12px 15px 4px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)}
.mega-foot span{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px}
.mega-foot a{color:var(--accent-soft);font-weight:600;font-size:14px}

/* mobile nav (checkbox hack) */
.nav-toggle{display:none}
.burger{display:none;width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--line-2);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);cursor:pointer;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.burger span,.burger span::before,.burger span::after{content:"";display:block;width:18px;height:2px;background:#fff;border-radius:2px;position:relative;transition:.25s var(--ease)}
.burger span::before{position:absolute;top:-6px}.burger span::after{position:absolute;top:6px}

/* ── footer ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
footer{border-top:1px solid var(--line);margin-top:96px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,rgba(62,166,255,.04))}
.foot{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:36px;padding:64px 0 40px}
.foot h5{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted-2);margin-bottom:16px;font-weight:500}
.foot ul{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.foot a{color:var(--muted);font-size:14.5px;transition:color .2s}
.foot a:hover{color:var(--accent-soft)}
.foot-brand p{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;margin-top:14px;max-width:34ch}
.foot-contact a{display:block;color:var(--text);font-weight:600;font-size:15px;margin-bottom:6px}
.foot-bottom{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  padding:22px 0 40px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)}
.foot-bottom p,.foot-bottom a{color:var(--muted-2);font-size:13px}

/* ── reveal (restrained, reduced-motion safe) ────────────── */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:no-preference){
  @keyframes rise{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(26px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
  .reveal{animation:rise .8s var(--ease) both;animation-timeline:view();animation-range:entry 0% entry 26%}
  @keyframes spin4d{to{transform:rotateX(360deg) rotateY(360deg)}}
}

/* ── shared section furniture ────────────────────────────── */
section{position:relative}
.section-head{max-width:64ch}
.section-head h2{font-size:clamp(30px,4.2vw,46px)}
.section-head .lede{margin-top:16px}
.pad{padding:96px 0}
.divider{height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--line-2),transparent)}

/* ── hero (home) ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
.hero{position:relative;padding:64px 0 40px}
.hero-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.05fr .95fr;gap:40px;align-items:center;min-height:min(78vh,660px)}
.hero h1{font-size:clamp(42px,6.6vw,78px);margin:20px 0 0}
.hero h1 .accent{color:var(--accent)}
.hero .lede{margin:22px 0 30px;font-size:19px}
.hero-ctas{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:14px}
.hero-meta{display:flex;gap:30px;margin-top:38px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.hero-meta .k{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:30px;color:#fff;font-weight:600}
.hero-meta .v{color:var(--muted);font-size:13.5px;margin-top:2px}
.hero-visual{position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:420px}
.orbit{position:relative;width:min(460px,86vw);aspect-ratio:1}
.tess{width:100%;height:100%;filter:drop-shadow(0 24px 60px rgba(62,166,255,.28))}
.spin{transform-origin:160px 160px}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:no-preference){.spin{animation:spin2 26s linear infinite}@keyframes spin2{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}}
.node{position:absolute;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--accent-soft);background:rgba(9,13,20,.7);border:1px solid var(--line-2);padding:6px 11px;border-radius:999px;backdrop-filter:blur(6px)}
.node.n1{top:4%;left:14%}.node.n2{top:14%;right:2%}.node.n3{bottom:12%;right:8%}.node.n4{bottom:2%;left:8%}

/* ── dimension tiles / cards (collection) ────────────────── */
.dim-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px;margin-top:44px}
.tile{position:relative;display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:30px 30px 26px;border-radius:var(--r-lg);
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--surface),var(--bg-2));border:1px solid var(--line);
  overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .3s var(--ease),transform .3s var(--ease)}
.tile::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:inherit;padding:1px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s var(--ease);
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(62,166,255,.6),transparent 40%);-webkit-mask:linear-gradient(#000 0 0) content-box,linear-gradient(#000 0 0);-webkit-mask-composite:xor;mask-composite:exclude}
.tile:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);border-color:var(--line-2)}
.tile:hover::after{opacity:1}
.tile .coord{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.16em;color:var(--muted-2)}
.tile h3{font-size:27px;margin:14px 0 10px}
.tile p{color:var(--muted);font-size:15px;line-height:1.6}
.chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin:18px 0 22px}
.chips span{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--accent-soft);background:rgba(62,166,255,.09);border:1px solid rgba(62,166,255,.22);padding:5px 11px;border-radius:999px;font-weight:500}
.tile-link{margin-top:auto;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;color:#fff;font-weight:600;font-size:15px}
.tile-link .arrow{color:var(--accent)}

/* ── stepped flow ────────────────────────────────────────── */
.flow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:0;margin-top:44px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r-lg);overflow:hidden}
.step{padding:30px 26px;border-right:1px solid var(--line);position:relative;background:rgba(255,255,255,.012)}
.step:last-child{border-right:none}
.step .num{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:.14em}
.step h4{font-size:21px;margin:12px 0 8px}
.step p{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;line-height:1.55}

/* ── image + text feature ────────────────────────────────── */
.feature{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.05fr;gap:44px;align-items:center;margin-top:8px}
.feature.flip{grid-template-columns:1.05fr 1fr}
.feature.flip .shot{order:2}
.feature .shot{border-radius:var(--r-lg);overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--line-2);position:relative;aspect-ratio:4/3}
.feature .shot img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.feature .shot::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,rgba(10,14,20,.5)),linear-gradient(120deg,rgba(62,166,255,.12),transparent 55%)}
.feature h2{font-size:clamp(28px,3.6vw,40px)}
.feature .lede{margin:16px 0 22px}
.ficons{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;margin:6px 0 26px}
.ficons li{display:flex;gap:13px;align-items:flex-start;list-style:none}
.ficons .b{width:22px;height:22px;flex:none;margin-top:2px;border-radius:6px;background:rgba(62,166,255,.12);border:1px solid rgba(62,166,255,.3);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--accent);font-size:13px;font-weight:700}
.ficons b{color:#fff;font-weight:600}.ficons p{color:var(--muted);font-size:14.5px;margin-top:2px}

/* ── why / divided list ──────────────────────────────────── */
.why{display:grid;grid-template-columns:.8fr 1.2fr;gap:48px;align-items:start}
.why-sticky{position:sticky;top:100px}
.why-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.why-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr;gap:20px;padding:26px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--line)}
.why-row:first-child{border-top:none;padding-top:0}
.why-row .rc{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted-2);padding-top:5px}
.why-row h4{font-size:20px;margin-bottom:8px}
.why-row p{color:var(--muted);font-size:15px}

/* ── CTA band ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cta-band{margin-top:20px;border-radius:var(--r-lg);border:1px solid var(--line-2);overflow:hidden;position:relative;
  background:radial-gradient(700px 300px at 80% 0%,rgba(62,166,255,.22),transparent 60%),linear-gradient(180deg,var(--surface),var(--bg-2))}
.cta-band .inner{padding:60px 48px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:26px;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.cta-band h2{font-size:clamp(28px,3.6vw,40px);max-width:16ch}
.cta-band p{color:var(--muted);margin-top:12px}
.cta-actions{display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap}

/* ── inner-page hero (category / company / contact) ──────── */
.phero{padding:70px 0 20px;position:relative}
.phero .coord{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.18em;color:var(--muted-2);display:block;margin-bottom:14px}
.phero h1{font-size:clamp(38px,5.4vw,64px);max-width:16ch}
.phero .lede{margin:20px 0 28px;font-size:19px}
.phero-ctas{display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.crumbs{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted-2);margin-bottom:22px}
.crumbs a{color:var(--muted)}.crumbs a:hover{color:var(--accent-soft)}

/* ── service grid (category capabilities, collection) ────── */
.svc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;margin-top:40px}
.svc{display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:24px;border-radius:var(--r);background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);transition:border-color .25s var(--ease),transform .25s var(--ease),background .25s var(--ease)}
.svc:hover{border-color:var(--line-2);transform:translateY(-3px);background:var(--surface-2)}
.svc .tag{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--accent-soft);margin-bottom:12px}
.svc h3{font-size:18px;margin-bottom:8px}
.svc p{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;line-height:1.55}
.svc .more{margin-top:14px;color:var(--accent-soft);font-weight:600;font-size:13.5px}

/* ── sibling dimensions nav ──────────────────────────────── */
.siblings{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;margin-top:40px}
.sib{display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:24px;border-radius:var(--r);border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--bg-2);transition:border-color .25s,transform .25s}
.sib:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.sib .coord{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted-2);letter-spacing:.14em}
.sib h4{font-size:20px;margin:10px 0 6px}
.sib p{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px}
.sib .go{margin-top:14px;color:#fff;font-weight:600;font-size:14px}

/* ── stat strip ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
.stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1px;background:var(--line);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r-lg);overflow:hidden;margin-top:8px}
.stats>div{background:var(--bg-2);padding:30px 26px}
.stats .k{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:34px;color:#fff;font-weight:600}
.stats .v{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;margin-top:6px}

/* ── contact ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:40px;align-items:start;margin-top:12px}
.field{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-bottom:18px}
.field label{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600}
.field input,.field textarea,.field select{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--line-2);border-radius:10px;
  padding:13px 15px;color:var(--text);font:inherit;font-size:15px;transition:border-color .2s}
.field input::placeholder,.field textarea::placeholder{color:var(--muted-2)}
.field input:focus,.field textarea:focus,.field select:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(62,166,255,.16)}
.field.row{flex-direction:row;gap:12px}.field.row>*{flex:1}
.contact-card{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r-lg);padding:30px;background:var(--surface)}
.contact-card h3{font-size:19px;margin-bottom:16px}
.cline{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;padding:14px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--line)}
.cline:first-of-type{border-top:none}
.cline .ic{width:26px;flex:none;color:var(--accent);font-size:16px;text-align:center}
.cline b{display:block;color:#fff;font-size:15px}.cline span{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px}

/* ── article (tier-3) ────────────────────────────────────── */
.article{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;max-width:820px;margin:0 auto}
.article h2{font-size:clamp(24px,3vw,32px);margin:44px 0 14px}
.article h3{font-size:20px;margin:30px 0 10px}
.article p{color:var(--muted);font-size:16.5px;line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:16px}
.article ul{margin:0 0 20px 0;padding:0;list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.article ul li{color:var(--muted);font-size:16px;line-height:1.6;padding-left:26px;position:relative}
.article ul li::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;top:9px;width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--accent)}
.callout{border:1px solid var(--line-2);border-left:3px solid var(--accent);border-radius:12px;padding:22px 24px;background:var(--surface);margin:26px 0}
.callout p{color:var(--text);margin:0}

@media (max-width:920px){
  .hero-grid,.feature,.feature.flip,.why,.contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .feature.flip .shot{order:0}
  .hero-visual{order:-1;min-height:320px}
  .why-sticky{position:static}
  .dim-grid,.svc-grid,.siblings{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .flow,.stats{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .step:nth-child(2n){border-right:none}
}
@media (max-width:640px){
  .dim-grid,.svc-grid,.siblings,.flow,.stats{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .step{border-right:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}
  .stats>div{padding:24px}
  .cta-band .inner{padding:40px 26px}
}

/* ── responsive ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width:900px){
  .foot{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:30px}
  .burger{display:flex}
  .nav-links{position:fixed;inset:72px 0 auto 0;flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;gap:0;
    background:var(--bg-2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);padding:8px;
    max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height .3s var(--ease)}
  .nav-toggle:checked~.nav-links{max-height:80vh;overflow:auto}
  .nav-links>li>a,.nav-trigger{padding:14px 16px;font-size:16px;border-radius:12px}
  .mega{position:static;transform:none;width:auto;opacity:1;visibility:visible;pointer-events:auto;
    box-shadow:none;background:transparent;border:none;padding:6px 6px 14px}
  .mega-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .nav .btn{display:none}
}
@media (max-width:620px){
  .foot{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .wrap{padding:0 20px}
  .pad{padding:70px 0}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<header>
  <div class="wrap">
    <nav class="nav">
      <input type="checkbox" id="navToggle" class="nav-toggle" hidden="">
      <a href="/" class="brand"><svg class="glyph" viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
  <rect x="30" y="30" width="40" height="40" rx="3" stroke="#3ea6ff" stroke-width="4"></rect>
  <rect x="14" y="14" width="52" height="52" rx="4" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="3" opacity=".65"></rect>
  <path d="M14 14 30 30M66 14 70 30M14 66 30 70M66 66 70 70" stroke="#3ea6ff" stroke-width="3" opacity=".8"></path>
</svg><span data-cms="cms-1">4D Security<small>ALL DIMENSIONS</small></span></a>
      <div class="nav-spacer"></div>
      <ul class="nav-links" data-cms-collection="col1">
        <li class="has-mega">
          <span class="nav-trigger" data-cms="cms-2">Solutions
            <svg class="chev" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"></path></svg>
          </span>
          <div class="mega">
            <div class="mega-grid" data-cms-collection="col2">
              <a href="/offense" class="mega-item" data-cms-item="col2"><div class="mi-top"><span class="dot"></span><h4 data-cms="cms-3">Offense</h4></div><p data-cms="cms-4">Offensive testing that finds the gaps before an attacker does.</p></a>
              <a href="/defense" class="mega-item" data-cms-item="col2"><div class="mi-top"><span class="dot"></span><h4 data-cms="cms-5">Defense</h4></div><p data-cms="cms-6">Managed detection and response watching your estate around the clock.</p></a>
              <a href="/protection" class="mega-item" data-cms-item="col2"><div class="mi-top"><span class="dot"></span><h4 data-cms="cms-7">Protection</h4></div><p data-cms="cms-8">Cloud, data and identity controls that hold under pressure.</p></a>
              <a href="/governance" class="mega-item" data-cms-item="col2"><div class="mi-top"><span class="dot"></span><h4 data-cms="cms-9">Governance</h4></div><p data-cms="cms-10">Risk, compliance and critical systems, mapped to your business.</p></a>
            </div>
            <div class="mega-foot"><span data-cms="cms-11">Thirty capabilities, organised into four dimensions.</span><a href="/company" class="arrow-link" data-cms="cms-12">Why four dimensions ›</a></div>
          </div>
        </li>
        <li data-cms-item="col1"><a href="/company" data-cms="cms-13">Company</a></li>
        <li data-cms-item="col1"><a href="/contact" data-cms="cms-14">Contact</a></li>
      </ul>
      <a href="/contact" class="btn btn-primary" data-cms="cms-15">Book a consultation</a>
      <label for="navToggle" class="burger" aria-label="Menu"><span></span></label>
    </nav>
  </div>
</header>
<main data-cms-collection="col3">
<section id="page-hero" class="phero">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="crumbs" data-cms-collection="col4"><a href="/" data-cms="cms-16" data-cms-item="col4">Home</a> <span>/</span> <a href="/offense" data-cms="cms-17" data-cms-item="col4">Solutions</a> <span>/</span> <span data-cms="cms-18">Offense</span></div>
    <span class="coord" data-cms="cms-19">D1 / OFFENSE</span>
    <h1 data-cms="cms-20">Find the gaps before an attacker does.</h1>
    <p class="lede" data-cms="cms-21">The offense dimension is about pressure-testing your defenses on purpose. We think like an adversary so your weak points surface on your terms.</p>
    <div class="phero-ctas">
      <a href="/contact" class="btn btn-primary" data-cms="cms-22">Book a consultation <span class="arrow">→</span></a>
      <a href="/company" class="btn btn-ghost" data-cms="cms-23">Why four dimensions</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="capabilities" class="pad" data-cms-item="col3">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head"><h2 data-cms="cms-24">What Offense covers.</h2><p class="lede" data-cms="cms-25">Seven capabilities that show you exactly where you are exposed, and how a real attacker would get in.</p></div>
    <div class="svc-grid" data-cms-collection="col5">
      <a href="/penetration-testing" class="svc"><span class="tag" data-cms="cms-26">PEN TESTING</span><h3 data-cms="cms-27">Penetration Testing</h3><p data-cms="cms-28">Goal-driven testing of networks, applications, cloud and people by hands-on experts.</p><span class="more" data-cms="cms-29">Read more →</span></a>
      <div class="svc" data-cms-item="col5"><span class="tag" data-cms="cms-30">ASM</span><h3 data-cms="cms-31">Attack Surface Management</h3><p data-cms="cms-32">Continuous discovery of everything you expose to the internet, known and forgotten.</p></div>
      <div class="svc" data-cms-item="col5"><span class="tag" data-cms="cms-33">CTEM</span><h3 data-cms="cms-34">Continuous Threat Exposure Management</h3><p data-cms="cms-35">A running program that ranks exposures by real, exploitable risk.</p></div>
      <div class="svc" data-cms-item="col5"><span class="tag" data-cms="cms-36">BAS</span><h3 data-cms="cms-37">Breach & Attack Simulation</h3><p data-cms="cms-38">Safely emulate real attacker techniques against your live controls.</p></div>
      <div class="svc" data-cms-item="col5"><span class="tag" data-cms="cms-39">PHISHING</span><h3 data-cms="cms-40">Phishing Simulation</h3><p data-cms="cms-41">Test how your people respond to a convincing lure, then close the gap.</p></div>
      <div class="svc" data-cms-item="col5"><span class="tag" data-cms="cms-42">EUAT</span><h3 data-cms="cms-43">End-User Awareness Training</h3><p data-cms="cms-44">Training that turns everyday staff into a reliable first line of defense.</p></div>
      <div class="svc" data-cms-item="col5"><span class="tag" data-cms="cms-45">BRAND</span><h3 data-cms="cms-46">Brand Protection</h3><p data-cms="cms-47">Hunt down lookalike domains and impersonation before customers get fooled.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="outcomes" class="pad" data-cms-item="col3">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="why">
      <div class="why-sticky"><h2 data-cms="cms-48">What you get.</h2><p class="lede" data-cms="cms-49">Every Offense engagement is measured by outcomes your business can feel, not activity for its own sake.</p></div>
      <div class="why-list" data-cms-collection="col6">
        <div class="why-row" data-cms-item="col6"><div class="rc">01</div><div><h4 data-cms="cms-50">A ranked list of what to fix</h4><p data-cms="cms-51">Not a 300-page dump. A prioritised set of findings tied to business impact and a clear path to closure.</p></div></div>
        <div class="why-row" data-cms-item="col6"><div class="rc">02</div><div><h4 data-cms="cms-52">Proof for customers and auditors</h4><p data-cms="cms-53">Attestation and retest evidence you can hand to clients, insurers and compliance teams.</p></div></div>
        <div class="why-row" data-cms-item="col6"><div class="rc">03</div><div><h4 data-cms="cms-54">Fewer real incidents</h4><p data-cms="cms-55">Every gap you close on purpose is one an attacker cannot use later.</p></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="more-dimensions" class="pad" data-cms-item="col3">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head"><h2 data-cms="cms-56">The other three dimensions.</h2><p class="lede" data-cms="cms-57">Security only works when the dimensions connect. Here is the rest of the picture.</p></div>
    <div class="siblings" data-cms-collection="col7">
      <a href="/defense" class="sib" data-cms-item="col7"><span class="coord" data-cms="cms-58">D2 / DEFENSE</span><h4 data-cms="cms-59">Defense</h4><p data-cms="cms-60">Managed detection and response watching your estate around the clock.</p><span class="go" data-cms="cms-61">Explore Defense →</span></a>
      <a href="/protection" class="sib" data-cms-item="col7"><span class="coord" data-cms="cms-62">D3 / PROTECTION</span><h4 data-cms="cms-63">Protection</h4><p data-cms="cms-64">Cloud, data and identity controls that hold under pressure.</p><span class="go" data-cms="cms-65">Explore Protection →</span></a>
      <a href="/governance" class="sib" data-cms-item="col7"><span class="coord" data-cms="cms-66">D4 / GOVERNANCE</span><h4 data-cms="cms-67">Governance</h4><p data-cms="cms-68">Risk, compliance and critical systems, mapped to your business.</p><span class="go" data-cms="cms-69">Explore Governance →</span></a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="cta" class="pad" data-cms-item="col3">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="cta-band"><div class="inner">
      <div><h2 data-cms="cms-70">Bring Offense into focus.</h2><p data-cms="cms-71">Book a short consultation and we will show you where you stand in this dimension.</p></div>
      <div class="cta-actions">
        <a href="/contact" class="btn btn-primary" data-cms="cms-72">Book a consultation <span class="arrow">→</span></a>
        <a href="tel:+18166651900" class="btn btn-ghost" data-cms="cms-73">816.665.1900</a>
      </div>
    </div></div>
  </div>
</section>
</main>
<footer>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="foot" data-cms-collection="col8">
      <div class="foot-brand">
        <a href="/" class="brand"><svg class="glyph" viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
  <rect x="30" y="30" width="40" height="40" rx="3" stroke="#3ea6ff" stroke-width="4"></rect>
  <rect x="14" y="14" width="52" height="52" rx="4" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="3" opacity=".65"></rect>
  <path d="M14 14 30 30M66 14 70 30M14 66 30 70M66 66 70 70" stroke="#3ea6ff" stroke-width="3" opacity=".8"></path>
</svg><span data-cms="cms-74">4D Security<small>ALL DIMENSIONS</small></span></a>
        <p data-cms="cms-75">Multi-dimensional security built around your operational goals, from offensive testing to governance.</p>
      </div>
      <div data-cms-item="col8">
        <h5 data-cms="cms-76">Dimensions</h5>
        <ul data-cms-collection="col9">
          <li data-cms-item="col9"><a href="/offense" data-cms="cms-77">Offense</a></li>
          <li data-cms-item="col9"><a href="/defense" data-cms="cms-78">Defense</a></li>
          <li data-cms-item="col9"><a href="/protection" data-cms="cms-79">Protection</a></li>
          <li data-cms-item="col9"><a href="/governance" data-cms="cms-80">Governance</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div data-cms-item="col8">
        <h5 data-cms="cms-81">Company</h5>
        <ul data-cms-collection="col10">
          <li data-cms-item="col10"><a href="/company" data-cms="cms-82">Why 4D</a></li>
          <li data-cms-item="col10"><a href="/penetration-testing" data-cms="cms-83">Penetration Testing</a></li>
          <li data-cms-item="col10"><a href="/contact" data-cms="cms-84">Contact</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="foot-contact" data-cms-collection="col11">
        <h5 data-cms="cms-85">Talk to us</h5>
        <a href="mailto:info@4DSec.io" data-cms="cms-86" data-cms-item="col11">info@4DSec.io</a>
        <a href="tel:+18166651900" data-cms="cms-87" data-cms-item="col11">816.665.1900</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="foot-bottom">
      <p data-cms="cms-88">© 2026 4D Security, LLC. All rights reserved.</p>
      <a href="/contact" data-cms="cms-89">Request a security consultation</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

</body></html>
